name: New Customer Welcome
headline: 15% off your first order
messageTemplate: Welcome to McDonald's! Tap for 15% off your first order at {{storeName}}.
notes: Only valid for customers with zero prior orders.

name: Weekend Family Bundle
headline: Family Bundle — $24.99
messageTemplate: Dinner time? Family Bundle at {{storeName}} — 2 Big Macs, 2 Happy Meals for $24.99.
notes: Weekends only, 16:00–20:00 local. Targets customers with avg order > $25.

name: Late-Night $1 McFlurry
headline: $1 McFlurry after 10pm
messageTemplate: Still up? $1 McFlurry at {{storeName}} until close.

name: Win-Back 20% Off
headline: We miss you — 20% off
messageTemplate: It's been a while! 20% off your next order at {{storeName}}.
notes: For customers whose last order was 90+ days ago.

name: Loyalty — Free Coffee
headline: Free coffee on us
messageTemplate: Your regular is on us this morning at {{storeName}}. Tap to redeem.
notes: For customers with 10+ visits in the last 30 days. Morning hours 06:00–11:00.
